list.name: Changes
list.comment:
refactor: convert homepage to client component and add orders endpoint alias
- Convert homepage from server-side to client-side rendering with useEffect for product fetching - Add alert utility classes (alert-success, alert-error) to global styles - Add /my-orders endpoint alias in orders router for dashboard compatibility

task.summary:
feat: migrate OTP verification from phone to email-based authentication
- Replace phone-based OTP with email OTP for user registration and login - Update User model: rename `phone_verified` to `email_verified` - Add email sender utility with SMTP configuration for OTP delivery - Enhance verify-otp page with improved UX (paste support, auto-focus, masked email display) - Update login flow to require email instead of phone number - Add success/error status alerts to login page - Improve register page with better error handling and visual feedback - Fix bcrypt compatibility issues by replacing passlib with direct bcrypt usage - Add Redis fallback to in-memory storage for local development - Update Navbar with hydration-safe user state rendering - Create database tables on app startup for easier local development - Add new API endpoints: `/auth/otp/email/verify` and `/auth/otp/email/resend` - Update auth schemas to support email-based OTP flow - Maintain backward compatibility with legacy phone-based OTP endpoints

refactor: convert homepage to client component and add orders endpoint alias
- Convert homepage from server-side to client-side rendering with useEffect for product fetching - Add alert utility classes (alert-success, alert-error) to global styles - Add /my-orders endpoint alias in orders router for dashboard compatibility

MESSAGE.value:
feat: migrate OTP verification from phone to email-based authentication
- Replace phone-based OTP with email OTP for user registration and login - Update User model: rename `phone_verified` to `email_verified` - Add email sender utility with SMTP configuration for OTP delivery - Enhance verify-otp page with improved UX (paste support, auto-focus, masked email display) - Update login flow to require email instead of phone number - Add success/error status alerts to login page - Improve register page with better error handling and visual feedback - Fix bcrypt compatibility issues by replacing passlib with direct bcrypt usage - Add Redis fallback to in-memory storage for local development - Update Navbar with hydration-safe user state rendering - Create database tables on app startup for easier local development - Add new API endpoints: `/auth/otp/email/verify` and `/auth/otp/email/resend` - Update auth schemas to support email-based OTP flow - Maintain backward compatibility with legacy phone-based OTP endpoints

refactor: convert homepage to client component and add orders endpoint alias
- Convert homepage from server-side to client-side rendering with useEffect for product fetching - Add alert utility classes (alert-success, alert-error) to global styles - Add /my-orders endpoint alias in orders router for dashboard compatibility

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
refactor: convert homepage to client component and add orders endpoint alias
- Convert homepage from server-side to client-side rendering with useEffect for product fetching - Add alert utility classes (alert-success, alert-error) to global styles - Add /my-orders endpoint alias in orders router for dashboard compatibility
